name: Aleigh
response: I struggle most with aligning stakeholders early, because everyone has a different definition of success.
Hardest part is managing scope creep when timelines are tight.

name: Sam
response: Recruiting the right participants takes longer than people expect.
Balancing tech debt with new features is the constant challenge.

name: Jordan
response: Prioritization: saying no to good ideas so we can ship the best ones.

name: Casey
response: Synthesizing messy qualitative data into clear, actionable themes.
